blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No true AWQ model available. Model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros tensors (GPTQ format). AWQ kernel selection code verified correct by code inspection (engine.py lines 3455-3477). Test test_awq_dual_dispatch.py fails due to test design issue (no weights loaded, empty layer cache). Kernel loads successfully: 'GEMV INT4 dual AWQ (fused gate+up+silu, no zero-point) loaded'. AWQ mode propagates to all 4 GPUs.

No true AWQ model available. Model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros tensors (GPTQ format). C dispatch integration code verified correct by code inspection. E2E validation blocked - running AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights causes NaN/Inf (AWQ kernel skips zero-point subtraction, GPTQ weights have non-zero zeros).

appliedUpdates.description: Updated note about AWQ model format detection - model at /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ has qzeros tensors, detected as GPTQ

VAL-AWQ-001.summary: AWQ dual kernel produces numerically correct output

VAL-AWQ-003.summary: AWQ dual kernel shows 2.6-4.7% speedup over GPTQ dual kernel

recommendations.description: Obtain true AWQ model (with qweight/scales but no qzeros) to validate VAL-AWQ-002 and VAL-AWQ-004 E2E
recommendations.rationale: Current 'AWQ' model directory has qzeros tensors, making it GPTQ format. AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights produces NaN/Inf.

recommendations.description: Fix test_awq_dual_dispatch.py to load mock weights or use real model
recommendations.rationale: Test creates engine without weights, leading to empty layer cache and false failures

VAL-AWQ-002.finding: Correct implementation: when _awq_mode=True and _gemv_int4_dual_awq_fused is available, selects AWQ dual kernel (12 params, no zeros) instead of GPTQ dual kernel (14 params)

kernelLoading.finding: AWQ dual kernel loads successfully: 'GEMV INT4 dual AWQ (fused gate+up+silu, no zero-point) loaded'
kernelLoading.propagation: set_awq_mode(True) correctly propagates to all 4 TP engines
